title: Implement resource claim and policy gate integration
description: Connect actor assignment to governed resource claims and policy evaluation. Runtime must show which resources the actor needs, which policies apply, and whether execution is allowed, blocked, degraded, or requires council approval.
triage_notes: Completed TASK-052: actor-execution-gate-record now connects actor assignment evaluation to resource claim and policy evaluation refs; gate decisions report allowed, blocked, degraded, or requires-council-review; fixtures RCL-TASK-052-REPO-MAIN, PER-TASK-052-RUNTIME-DISCIPLINE, and AEG-TASK-052-REQUIRES-REVIEW validate the review-required path; runtime proof written to /tmp/aof-task052-execution-gate.json.
